jobs.title: Senior DevOps Engineer (Remote)
jobs.summary: Join Zalando platform team to own Kubernetes-based infrastructure at scale. Drive CI/CD modernization with ArgoCD and GitOps patterns. Collaborate with 80+ engineering teams across Europe.

jobs.title: Platform Engineer — Cloud Infrastructure
jobs.summary: N26 is hiring a Platform Engineer to lead EKS cluster operations and IaC standardization using Terraform modules. Security-first mindset required — integrate Trivy and SAST tooling into pipelines.

jobs.title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) — Kubernetes
jobs.summary: Own reliability and observability for Personio HR platform serving 10,000+ customers. Build runbooks, SLOs, and alerting with Prometheus/Grafana. Drive incident response and post-mortem culture.

jobs.title: DevOps / Cloud Engineer — Azure (Home Office)
jobs.summary: CHECK24 is expanding its Azure-first cloud platform. Looking for a DevOps engineer to manage AKS clusters, automate deployments via GitHub Actions, and enforce security policies with SonarQube and tfsec.

jobs.title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer — GCP/K8s
jobs.summary: Scale GCP infrastructure for food delivery operations across 70+ countries. Lead Kubernetes platform improvements, multi-region Terraform deployments, and cost optimization with autoscaling.

jobs.title: Junior-Mid DevOps Engineer — CI/CD Automation
jobs.summary: Taxfix needs a DevOps engineer to modernize its GitLab CI pipelines and introduce Ansible-based configuration management. Kubernetes experience preferred but not mandatory.

jobs.title: MLOps / DevOps Engineer — AI Platform
jobs.summary: Aleph Alpha is building sovereign European AI. Join as MLOps/DevOps Engineer to manage GPU Kubernetes clusters, ML pipeline infrastructure with Kubeflow, and cloud cost optimization.
